MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Jeffrey Long (916)443-4849 for Defendant John Stewart Compoany the moving party/ No Appearance by the opposing party.

DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Jeffrey Long (916)443-4849 for Defendant John Stewart Compoany the moving party/ No Appearance by the opposing party.

DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the second paragraph of the first cause of action is overruled. Moving party provides no authority for demurrer to a portion of a cause of action. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for Plaintiff to separately allege its intentional torts and to allege all elements of such torts. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Continued To Dec-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued on the Court's own motion to December 6, 2013 to provide moving party an opportunity to provide the Court a courtesy copy of the operative pleading. Moving party is ordered to provide the Court with a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint by 4:00pm on November 15, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
